title: tephrosia diffusa
intro: Tephrosia diffusa, also known as the Palaash or Desert Teak, is a tree-like legume native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia diffusa include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
